nasb.text: Be on your guard before him and obey his voice; do not be rebellious toward him, for he will not pardon your transgression, since My name is in him.

esv.text: Pay careful attention to him and obey his voice; do not rebel against him, for he will not pardon your transgression, for my name is in him.

cnv.text: 你們在他面前要謹慎，要聽他的話，不可違背他；不然，他必不赦免你們的過犯，因為他是奉我的名來的。

ccb.text: 他是奉我的名来的，你们要谨遵他的话，不可悖逆，不然他必不赦免你们的过犯。
